languages.text: Идеально гладкая пирамида из черного камня, сверкающая бритвенно-острыми гранями, будто поглощала собой пространство. В центре каждой грани, составляя идеальную симметрию, парила круглая платформа, несущая на себе некрона с пластинами, покрашенными в синий и золотой. Несомненно, перед нами были истинные стражи сокровищ Тразина. Сотни меньших платформ то опускались вниз, то поднимались, облетая центральную пирамиду и устремляясь вверх — туда, где под потолком виднелись очертания первых ярусов галерей Музеона.

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] По пятам рой-топотун из каноптека всех цветов и размеров

languages.text: The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.
languages.original_text: Идеально гладкая пирамида из черного камня, сверкающая бритвенно-острыми гранями, будто поглощала собой пространство. В центре каждой грани, составляя идеальную симметрию, парила круглая платформа, несущая на себе некрона с пластинами, покрашенными в синий и золотой. Несомненно, перед нами были истинные стражи сокровищ Тразина. Сотни меньших платформ то опускались вниз, то поднимались, облетая центральную пирамиду и устремляясь вверх — туда, где под потолком виднелись очертания первых ярусов галерей Музеона.

traits.locale_text: The perfectly smooth pyramid of black stone, with shiny razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the space around it. In the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform carried a Necron, its plates painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were looking at the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and made their way up toward the ceiling, under which loomed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

A dozen creatures resembling metal skeletons had been twisted and set at monstrous, unnatural angles and then knit together in a lattice-like framework around a huge crystalline sphere. As soon as we entered, their repulsive heads turned toward us, gaping throats disgorging a monotonous trumpeting sound.
The walls of the chamber began to roil, expelling hordes of mechanical creatures.

There was no doubt that we were looking at the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and made their way up toward the ceiling, under which loomed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

languages.text: 那是一座黑石金字塔，它仿佛吞噬了周围的所有光线。其表面光滑如镜，边缘锋利如刃。金字塔每一面的正中央，都悬浮着一座圆形平台，彼此完全对称。每个平台上都站着一名太空死灵，外壳上是蓝金色的涂装。毫无疑问，我们所见的，正是特拉金宝藏的真正守护者。数以百计的小型平台环绕着中央金字塔，彼此交替起伏，缓缓向穹顶滑行。穹顶下方，隐约可见陈列馆第一层的回廊。
languages.original_text: The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

languages.text: La pirámide de piedra negra, perfectamente lisa y de bordes relucientes y afilados, parecía devorar la luz que la rodeaba. En el centro de cada una de sus caras había una plataforma circular flotando en perfecta simetría con las otras. Cada plataforma albergaba a un Necrón con un recubrimiento pintado de azul y dorado. Sin duda, estábamos ante los verdaderos guardianes del tesoro de Trazyn. Cientos de plataformas menores se elevaban y bajaban alternativamente mientras orbitaban la plataforma central y planeaban hacia el techo, bajo el que se podían vislumbrar los primeros niveles de las galerías del Museion.
languages.original_text: The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

traits.locale_text: La pirámide de piedra negra, perfectamente lisa y de bordes relucientes y afilados, parecía devorar la luz que la rodeaba. En el centro de cada una de sus caras había una plataforma circular flotando en perfecta simetría con las otras. Cada plataforma albergaba a un Necrón con un recubrimiento pintado de azul y dorado. Sin duda, estábamos ante los verdaderos guardianes del tesoro de Trazyn. Cientos de plataformas menores se elevaban y bajaban alternativamente mientras orbitaban la plataforma central y planeaban hacia el techo, bajo el que se podían vislumbrar los primeros niveles de las galerías del Museion.

languages.text: La pyramide de pierre noire, parfaitement lisse et aux arêtes acérées et brillantes, semblait absorber toute la lumière environnante. Au centre de chacune de ses faces, et avec une symétrie parfaite, flottait une plateforme circulaire, chacune surmontée d'un Nécron au châssis bleu et or. Nous avions devant nous les véritables gardiens du trésor de Trazyn. Autour de la pyramide centrale tournaient des centaines de petites plateformes, s'élevant jusqu'au plafond sous lequel on pouvait entrevoir les contours des premiers niveaux des galeries du Muséion.
languages.original_text: The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

traits.locale_text: La pyramide de pierre noire, parfaitement lisse et aux arêtes acérées et brillantes, semblait absorber toute la lumière environnante. Au centre de chacune de ses faces, et avec une symétrie parfaite, flottait une plateforme circulaire, chacune surmontée d'un Nécron au châssis bleu et or. Nous avions devant nous les véritables gardiens du trésor de Trazyn. languages.text: Siyah taştan yapılmış, parlayan jilet gibi keskin kenarları olan ve pürüzsüz piramit, etrafındaki ışığı yutuyor gibiydi. Piramidin yüzlerinin her birinin ortasında, diğerleriyle kusursuz bir simetri içinde yuvarlak bir platform asılı duruyordu. Her platformda kasası mavi ve altına boyanmış bir Nekron vardı. Trazyn'in hazinesinin gerçek koruyucularını gördüğümüze şüphe yoktu. Yüzlerce küçük platform, merkezî piramidin etrafında dönerken sırayla yükselip alçalıyor ve Museion'un galerilerinin ilk seviyelerinin ana hatlarının görülebildiği tavana doğru süzülüyordu.
languages.original_text: The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.

traits.locale_text: Siyah taştan yapılmış, parlayan jilet gibi keskin kenarları olan ve pürüzsüz piramit, etrafındaki ışığı yutuyor gibiydi. Piramidin yüzlerinin her birinin ortasında, diğerleriyle kusursuz bir simetri içinde yuvarlak bir platform asılı duruyordu. Her platformda kasası mavi ve altına boyanmış bir Nekron vardı. Trazyn'in hazinesinin gerçek koruyucularını gördüğümüze şüphe yoktu. Yüzlerce küçük platform, merkezî piramidin etrafında dönerken sırayla yükselip alçalıyor ve Museion'un galerilerinin ilk seviyelerinin ana hatlarının görülebildiği tavana doğru süzülüyordu.

languages.text: Die Pyramide aus schwarzem Stein mit ihrer makellosen Oberfläche und den messerscharfen Kanten schien das Licht um sich herum zu absorbieren. In der Mitte jeder Seite schwebte eine runde Plattform in perfekter Symmetrie mit den anderen. Jede Plattform trug einen Necron mit einem blau-goldenen Gehäuse. Es bestand kein Zweifel, dass dies die wahren Hüter von Trazyns Schatz waren. Hunderte kleinere Plattformen hoben und senkten sich, während sie die zentrale Pyramide umkreisten und sich der Decke näherten, unter der man die Umrisse der ersten Ebenen der Galerien des Museions erahnen konnte.

languages.text:
金属骨格を模した12体の生物が、巨大な水晶球を囲む格子状の枠組みの中に、歪んで不自然な角度に組み込まれていた。我々がその場に入ると、その不快な頭が我々に向けられ、喉の奥から単調なトランペットのような音が漏れた。
その部屋の壁が渦を巻き始め、機械的な生物の群れを吐き出した。
languages.original_text:
A dozen creatures resembling metal skeletons had been twisted and set at monstrous, unnatural angles and then knit together in a lattice-like framework around a huge crystalline sphere. As soon as we entered, their repulsive heads turned toward us, gaping throats disgorging a monotonous trumpeting sound.
The walls of the chamber began to roil, expelling hordes of mechanical creatures.

traits.locale_text:
金属骨格を模した12体の生物が、巨大な水晶球を囲む格子状の枠組みの中に、歪んで不自然な角度に組み込まれていた。我々がその場に入ると、その不快な頭が我々に向けられ、喉の奥から単調なトランペットのような音が漏れた。
その部屋の壁が渦を巻き始め、機械的な生物の群れを吐き出した。
